discovery.label: The real user problem and primary journey are confirmed.

validation.label: A prototype or thin end-to-end journey exists.
Critical empty, error, permission, and recovery states are defined.

build.label: Data ownership and permission boundaries are verified.
Critical user journeys have automated regression coverage.

release.label: Security, privacy, and accessibility checks pass.
Deployment health and failures are observable.

operate.label: Production behavior and user feedback are summarized.
